name: codex-macos-notifier
description: macOS notifications for Codex approval-like Bash commands and turn completion.

interface.shortDescription: macOS notifications for approval-like commands and reply completion.
interface.longDescription: Sends macOS notifications when Codex is about to run risky Bash commands and when a Codex turn finishes.
defaultPrompt: Notify me when Codex likely needs approval.
Notify me when a Codex turn finishes.
Explain how this notifier plugin works.
